text: Except as provided by this subchapter, the department may not regulate the prices, routes, or services provided by a motor carrier.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 643. Motor Carrier Registration
##### § 643.151 — Prohibition

Except as provided by this subchapter, the department may not regulate the prices, routes, or services provided by a motor carrier.

*Added by Acts 1997, 75th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 30.150(a), eff. Sept. 1, 1997.*

subsections.text: Except as provided by this subchapter, the department may not regulate the prices, routes, or services provided by a motor carrier.

history.raw: Added by Acts 1997, 75th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 30.150(a), eff. Sept. 1, 1997.
